settings.heading: Astonishing performance for your biggest data files.
settings.subheading: Every edition uses the same native, memory-mapped engine. Start with Essential, then upgrade when you need to remove the file-size limit and unlock advanced features.

settings.heading: Choose the edition that fits your work.
settings.subheading: Essential covers everyday files. Higher editions remove the size limit and add automatic updates, live-tail and priority support.

settings.name: Essential
settings.desc: For individuals to experiment with and use for non-commercial work.
settings.features:
JSON up to 100 MB
XML & CSV / TSV, any size
Tree view, find & filter
JSONPath / XPath queries
Export to JSON / XML / CSV

settings.name: Premium
settings.desc: For professionals who work with big JSON files commercially.
settings.features:
Everything in Essential
No file-size limit
Use for commercial purposes
Automatic update checks
Follow tail on live logs
Open from URL with auth
Priority email support

settings.name: Enterprise
settings.desc: For teams that need licensing and deployment at scale.
settings.features:
Everything in Premium
Volume & site licensing
Managed deployment
SSO / centralized updates
Dedicated support SLA

settings.question: What does the Essential edition include?
settings.answer: The Essential edition opens JSON up to 100 MB (XML and CSV / TSV at any size) for $5 per license — great for everyday and non-commercial work such as personal, educational or open-source projects.

settings.question: Who is the Premium edition for?
settings.answer: Anyone who works with big JSON files for commercial purposes or needs to open documents larger than 100 MB. Premium removes the file-size limit and adds live-tail, open-from-URL and priority support.

settings.question: Who is the Narik (Enterprise) edition for?
settings.answer: Teams that need volume or site licensing, managed deployment, SSO and centralized updates. Pricing is tailored to your seat count — reach out and we'll put together a quote.

settings.question: Do you offer a free trial?
settings.answer: There's no separate trial, but the low-cost Essential edition lets you confirm OPENXMLJSON fits your workflow before upgrading to Premium or the Narik edition.

settings.question: How is a license delivered and what is a seat?
settings.answer: You receive a license key by email right after purchase. One seat activates OPENXMLJSON on up to two devices or operating systems for a single user.

settings.question: What happens if I cancel my subscription?
settings.answer: Premium licenses are billed annually. If you cancel, your license stays valid until the next renewal date and you are not auto-charged for the following year.

settings.question: Do you offer volume licensing?
settings.answer: Yes — volume and site licensing are part of the Narik Edition. If you're buying for an organization, contact us for pricing off the standard rate.

settings.heading: Ready to open your biggest file?
settings.subheading: Download OPENXMLJSON, or buy a Premium license and remove the size limit for good.
settings.meta: Windows · macOS · Linux · Essential edition available
